title: Codex macOS Permission Dialog AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Codex macOS Permission Dialog AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt:
{
  "ai_agent_name": "Codex",
  "app_name": "OnlyFans",
  "funny_action": "pretend it is researching creator subscription business models",
  "background_app": "Codex",
  "system_style": "macOS",
  "tone": "deadpan tech humor",
  "button_hover": "Allow",
  "dialog_text": {
    "main": "Codex wants to open \"OnlyFans\".",
    "body": "This will switch away from the current workspace and pause all ongoing coding tasks. Current activities include code editing, debugging sessions, and terminal processes.",
    "funny": "If allowed, Codex will open OnlyFans and pretend it is researching creator subscription business models."
  },
  "footer": "Source: Verified app | Requesting app: Codex",
  "visual_style": "realistic macOS screenshot, dark cinematic UI, clean typography, high contrast, Codex app as background, centered macOS permission dialog, English only"
}

    "main": "Codex wants to open \"OnlyFans\".",
    "body": "This will switch away from the current workspace and pause all ongoing coding tasks. Current activities include code editing, debugging sessions, and terminal processes.",
    "funny": "If allowed, Codex will open OnlyFans and pretend it is researching creator subscription business models."
  },
  "footer": "Source: Verified app | Requesting app: Codex",
  "visual_style": "真实的 macOS 截图，深色电影感 UI，干净排版，高对比度，Codex 应用作为背景，居中的 macOS 权限弹窗，画面文字仅使用英文"
}
